violations.description: General employee practices. — --Food employee observed with soiled outer clothing. Employee uniform has accumulation of pet hair. Clean/change uniform as needed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need detail cleaning under shelving units/equipment.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Minor detail cleaning needed.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Floors need cleaning under equipment/storage shelving units.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Receptacles, covers/lids, adequate number, clean, insect/rodent proof, storage, frequency, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
